title: Renderer performance profiling and optimization
description: Measure and optimize ArchMap rendering latency across parse, layout, SVG generation, edge routing, overlays, abstraction, and DOM mount paths.
triage_notes: Initial benchmark shows parse is not the bottleneck. Medium sample: layout/render in hundreds of ms. Large sample: layout exceeds 1s, overview render exceeds 2s, stack+zone reached 8s+ in one measured run. Suspected hotspots: repeated full layout recomputation on overlay/view changes, O(edgeSegments^2) buildEdgePaths crossing/parallel offset work, label/box collision placement, routeEdges/resolveLabelCollisions dense scans, and DOM innerHTML replacement. Added tools/bench-render.mjs and npm script bench:render for repeatable baseline.
completion_criteria: Benchmarks report parse/layout/render times for representative small, medium, large, comprehensive, and screenflow cases.
At least one clear hotspot is optimized with before/after numbers.
Overlay toggles avoid unnecessary parse/layout work where semantics and geometry are unchanged.
Dense render validation remains green after optimization.
